layout_strategies.mobile_first: stack vertically on mobile, side-by-side on md+

hero.strategy: Split screen. Left: Strong Value Prop + CTA. Right: Visual Composition (App Mockup + Delicious Food).
hero.copy_headline: Venda Mais pelo WhatsApp com Cardápio Digital Automático
hero.copy_subhead: Sem taxas por pedido. Sem depender de programador. O cardápio que seus clientes amam usar.

social_proof.strategy: Strip of logos or stats. 'Used by 1000+ deliveries'. Emphasis on 'More Orders'.

comparison.neuromarketing: Highlight the 'Pain' of the old way (chaos, lost orders) vs the 'Relief' of the new way (organization, speed).

benefits.strategy: Bento Grid. Focus on: 0% Commission, Easy Edits, Mobile Perfect.

how_it_works.strategy: 3 Simple Steps. 1. Choose Template, 2. Customize, 3. Sell.
how_it_works.visual: Step-by-step illustrations or icons connected by a line.

templates_showcase.strategy: Carousel or Grid of 'Phone Screens' showing different niches (Pizza, Burger, Sushi).

faq.strategy: Accordion style. Address: 'Do I need a PC?', 'Is it really free?', 'How do I receive orders?'.

final_cta.strategy: Large, bold background (Orange). 'Start now, setup in 5 minutes'.

component_instructions.buttons: Use pill shapes. High contrast. Hover effects: lift and shadow.
component_instructions.cards: White bg, subtle border (zinc-200), soft shadow. Hover: border-orange-200.
component_instructions.typography: Use 'tracking-tight' for headings. 'text-balance' for better wrapping.

universal_guidelines: Do not use dark gradients for backgrounds, keep it fresh and appetizing (White/Orange/Light Gray).
Ensure 'data-testid' attributes on all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, links).
Mobile images must have max-height constraints (e.g., max-h-[50vh]).
Maintain the existing HomeHeader and Footer components.
instructions_to_main_agent: Refactor /app/app/page.tsx completely. Import the new fonts in the layout or via a style tag if layout is inaccessible. Build the sections sequentially as defined. Use the provided image URLs. Ensure the tone is direct and sales-focused.
